CREATE TABLE dictionaries (id INT PRIMARY KEY, dict_data JSON);
SELECT dict_data FROM dictionaries WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dict_data FROM dictionaries WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM dictionaries WHERE dict_data IS NOT NULL);
SELECT dict_data FROM dictionaries WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM dictionaries);
SELECT * FROM dictionaries AS d1 JOIN dictionaries AS d2 ON d1.id != d2.id WHERE d1.dict_data::text <> d2.dict_data::text;
UPDATE dictionaries SET dict_data = jsonb_set(dict_data, '{key7}', '"value7"') WHERE id = 2;
SELECT DISTINCT dict_data FROM dictionaries WHERE dict_data::text LIKE '%value%';
